01 — About Me

Building systems that matter.

Hello! I'm Ahsanul Yamin Babor, a dedicated Computer Science & Engineering student at Bangladesh Army University of Engineering and Technology (BAUET), currently in my 3rd year.

With a strong foundation in programming, problem-solving, and software engineering, I have developed practical skills through hands-on academic and personal projects.

My core expertise includes Data Structures & Algorithms and OOP in C++, along with full-stack web development using React, Next.js, and Django. I am currently advancing in Data Analytics and Business Intelligence — using Python, Excel, Power BI, and Tableau to transform raw data into meaningful insights.

Beyond academics, I am an active sportsman and engaged member of university clubs — sharpening teamwork, communication, and leadership skills.

Originally from Ishwardi, Pabna, Bangladesh — I come from a close-knit, education-oriented family of six that has deeply inspired my pursuit of academic and professional excellence.
